description_long: This house features a steep, dark gable roof with two red brick chimneys and a stone chimney base. The exterior walls are a light beige stucco or plaster, giving it a slightly aged appearance. The windows are tall, narrow, and arched with decorative muntins, arranged in symmetrical vertical rows on each side. The front facade includes a double wooden door with glass panels and ornate trim, flanked by matching arched windows. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional European or Gothic Revival architecture, with a focus on symmetry and verticality. The structure appears solid and robust, suitable for a residential neighborhood or historical urban setting.
description: A symmetrical, two-story house with a steep gable roof, arched windows, and a double wooden front door, featuring a light stucco exterior and two brick chimneys.
description_view_0: Side view showing three vertically stacked arched windows and the steep gable roof with two chimneys visible.
description_view_1: Gable end view with three vertically aligned arched windows and the roof peak with a chimney at the top.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main double wooden door, four arched windows, and the symmetrical facade beneath the gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite gable end view, mirroring the other side with three vertically stacked arched windows and the roof peak.
attribute_entryway_design: Double wooden door with glass panels, no porch, and decorative trim
